successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.service.ts exists and exports ILeaveService, LeaveService, and LeaveRequestFilters.
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.service.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for all public methods of LeaveService.
LeaveService constructor accepts ILeaveRepository, EmployeeService, PolicyService, BalanceService, INotificationRepository, IAuditRepository.
All state-changing operations (submit, approve, reject, cancel) write an audit record via IAuditRepository.
All inputs are validated before processing (e.g., leave request exists, valid status transitions, manager authorization).
The service validates the leave request against leave policies (max days, consecutive days, blackout dates) using PolicyService before allowing submission.
On approval, the service deducts the requested days from the employee's leave balance via BalanceService.
The service sends notifications via INotificationRepository on state changes (e.g., submit, approve, reject, cancel).

Each state-changing operation (submit, approve, reject, cancel) is executed atomically: the leave request status update, any balance adjustments, and the audit log entry are performed within a single database transaction.
The service does not log any sensitive data (passwords, tokens, PII, financial data) in accordance with GP-004.
All async errors are caught and handled; no unhandled promise rejections (GP-006).

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: The service must enforce manager authorization for approve/reject operations.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, leave -> notification. No reverse dependencies are permitted.
outOfScope: Phase 10 — Wire services, create routes and controllers (leave.controller.ts)
Implementation of dependent services (EmployeeService, PolicyService, BalanceService, INotificationRepository, IAuditRepository)
Integration tests beyond unit tests for LeaveService
